# Guide and doc templates

Agent-guide and documentation template contracts.

**Applicability:** Owning domain selectors: `.pi/extensions/**`, `internal/catalog/**`, `internal/project/**`, `internal/refs/**`, `internal/render/**`, `templates/**`.
